title: NoSpendableNotes variant is dead code — never returned by build_shielded_tx
description: TxBuildError::NoSpendableNotes is defined in tx_error.rs with a doc comment that implies it is returned when the scanner hasn't decrypted notes yet. But build_shielded_tx never returns it — when notes is empty, select_notes_spendable returns InsufficientFunds{have:0, need:N}. A caller checking for NoSpendableNotes as the signal to wait for the scanner will never see it. The variant is either dead code to be removed, or InsufficientFunds{have:0} needs to be changed to NoSpendableNotes to distinguish 'no notes at all' from 'notes exist but not enough'.
close_reason: build_shielded_tx returns NoSpendableNotes immediately when notes.is_empty()
